title: Neutral fab_plan_context and Selection Token Issuance
acceptance_criteria: planContext returns lightweight requirement_profile without L1 judgment fields.
planContext returns description_index with stable_id, level, required, selectable, description.
L0/L2 are required and L1 is AI-selectable.
L1 candidates do not include score, confidence, match_reasons, negative_reasons, or matched_profile_fields.

implementation.description: Write failing plan-context tests for neutral output, minimal description_index, required/selectable ids, and absence of ranking/reason fields.
implementation.expected_failure: Tests fail because current planContext returns legacy rules/shared bundle output.

implementation.description: Implement deterministic requirement_profile, description index assembly, and in-memory selection token cache with TTL.
Extract registry/index/token helpers so plan-context no longer depends on full get-rules payload builders.
quality_checks: Selection token code is isolated and testable.
No L1 ranking hints leak into normal output.
